text.message: I fear oj with the sheep port whit that much sheep is dangerous. Thinking about going 6, 5. What do you guys think?
Would anyone help me get to the port before them?
yes we can get u sheep port then 9 4 and 6 4 2
black, blue? I really think oj will be a very strong force with sheep port. Can we somehow prevent them?
all good then I am just thinking about balancing the game
black dont. Game over after that
haha he will win is what he'll do
I offer everything I got for that
can you trade me a brick too?
black we need to get that plow
I can give you 2 nb with that
why do u care so much about the sheep port
I literally dont I just know you will win if you get it
its not gg u dramatic girl
it is very good for you oj
also who tf uses girl as an insult
i think the 9-11 is better red
obv it is good for me sherlock
just gotta stop oj getting ore
I mean yeah but also they will just trade for it not like they are lacking sheep or anything else
still you dont really get anything from the 2
My plan was to monopolize the 9
also got unlucky with the missing 5's
blue if you want me to get road I need brick
You should have helped me get the sheep port I think. Now it's backfiring like I knew it would
he did help u by robbing me
it was black that couldve helped
